memberdef.argsstring: (SYN_IMGUI_Context *ctx, int16_t *x, int16_t *y, int16_t *w, int16_t *h, int16_t default_h)
memberdef.name: layout_resolve

briefdescription.para: Resolve widget geometry from the layout cursor.

detaileddescription.para: If the widget is inside a layout region AND all four geometry params are 0, fill them from the cursor and default width/height.

memberdef.argsstring: (SYN_IMGUI_Context *ctx)
memberdef.name: syn_imgui_init

briefdescription.para: Initialize the IMGUI context.

memberdef.argsstring: (SYN_IMGUI_Context *ctx, SYN_GfxContext gfx, bool select, bool back, int32_t enc_delta, bool touch_down, int16_t touch_x, int16_t touch_y)
memberdef.name: syn_imgui_begin

briefdescription.para: Begin a new IMGUI frame.

detaileddescription.para: Resets the transient ID counter, processes physical navigation inputs, and resets active states.

parameterdescription.para: True if select button was pressed this frame.
True if back button was pressed this frame.
Encoder rotation value for this frame.
True if touch screen is active.

memberdef.argsstring: (SYN_IMGUI_Context *ctx)
memberdef.name: syn_imgui_end

briefdescription.para: End the IMGUI frame.

detaileddescription.para: Finalizes widget count tracking.

memberdef.argsstring: (const SYN_IMGUI_Context *ctx, int16_t x, int16_t y, int16_t w, int16_t h)
memberdef.name: is_hit_test

briefdescription.para: Test if touch coordinates fall within a rectangle.

memberdef.argsstring: (SYN_IMGUI_Context *ctx)
memberdef.name: track_focus

briefdescription.para: Track whether the focused widget was visited this frame.

memberdef.argsstring: (SYN_IMGUI_Context *ctx, const char *label, int16_t x, int16_t y, int16_t w, int16_t h)
memberdef.name: syn_imgui_button

briefdescription.para: Draw and handle a button.

simplesect.para: true if the button was selected/clicked this frame.

memberdef.argsstring: (SYN_IMGUI_Context *ctx, const char *label, bool *checked, int16_t x, int16_t y, int16_t w, int16_t h)
memberdef.name: syn_imgui_checkbox

briefdescription.para: Draw and handle a checkbox.

simplesect.para: true if the checkbox state was toggled this frame.

memberdef.argsstring: (SYN_IMGUI_Context *ctx, int32_t value, int32_t min, int32_t max, int16_t x, int16_t y, int16_t w, int16_t h)
memberdef.name: syn_imgui_progress_bar

briefdescription.para: Renders a non-interactive progress bar.

memberdef.argsstring: (SYN_IMGUI_Context *ctx, const char *label, int32_t *value, int32_t min, int32_t max, int16_t x, int16_t y, int16_t w, int16_t h)
memberdef.name: syn_imgui_slider

briefdescription.para: Draw and handle an integer value slider.

detaileddescription.para: When clicked or touched, this widget goes into "edit mode". While in edit mode, encoder rotation or direct touch drags change the value.

simplesect.para: true if the value was modified this frame.

memberdef.argsstring: (SYN_IMGUI_Context *ctx, const char *label, int32_t *selection, int32_t button_val, int16_t x, int16_t y, int16_t w, int16_t h)
memberdef.name: syn_imgui_radio

briefdescription.para: Draw and handle a radio button option.

detaileddescription.para: Sets the selection variable to the target button value if clicked or touched.

parameterdescription.para: Specific option value this button represents.

simplesect.para: true if the selection changed to this button's value this frame.

memberdef.argsstring: (SYN_IMGUI_Context *ctx, const char *label, const char **options, size_t count, int32_t *selected, int16_t x, int16_t y, int16_t w, int16_t h)
memberdef.name: syn_imgui_combo

briefdescription.para: Renders and handles an inline option selection dropdown/selector.

parameterdescription.para: Number of option strings in the array.

simplesect.para: true if selection changed this frame.

memberdef.argsstring: (SYN_IMGUI_Context *ctx, const char *title, const int32_t *data, size_t count, int32_t min_val, int32_t max_val, int16_t x, int16_t y, int16_t w, int16_t h)
memberdef.name: syn_imgui_graph

briefdescription.para: Renders a line telemetry chart.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to array of data points.

memberdef.argsstring: (SYN_GfxContext c, int16_t cx, int16_t cy, int16_t r, uint16_t color)
memberdef.name: draw_semi_circle

briefdescription.para: Draw a semicircle (top half) using Bresenham's algorithm.

memberdef.argsstring: (SYN_IMGUI_Context *ctx, const char *label, int32_t value, int32_t min, int32_t max, int16_t cx, int16_t cy, int16_t radius)
memberdef.name: syn_imgui_gauge

briefdescription.para: Renders an analog meter gauge with a needle indicator.

detaileddescription.para: Uses lightweight fixed-point integer mathematics for vector coordinates.

parameterdescription.para: Current value to point needle at.

memberdef.argsstring: (SYN_IMGUI_Context *ctx, const char *message, bool *ok_clicked, int16_t x, int16_t y, int16_t w, int16_t h)
memberdef.name: syn_imgui_dialog

briefdescription.para: Renders a modal confirmation dialog overlay.

detaileddescription.para: Captures all navigation and touch focus until dismissed.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to check trigger results (updated when OK is clicked).

simplesect.para: true if the modal dialog has been dismissed (OK or CANCEL selected).

memberdef.argsstring: (void)
memberdef.name: syn_imgui_default_style

briefdescription.para: Return the default monochrome style (white-on-black).

detaileddescription.para: The returned struct may be modified and passed to syn_imgui_set_style().

memberdef.argsstring: (SYN_IMGUI_Context *ctx, const SYN_IMGUI_Style *style)
memberdef.name: syn_imgui_set_style

briefdescription.para: Override the active style.

parameterdescription.para: Style to copy into the context.

memberdef.argsstring: (SYN_IMGUI_Context *ctx, int16_t x, int16_t y, int16_t w)
memberdef.name: syn_imgui_layout_begin

briefdescription.para: Begin an auto-layout region.

detaileddescription.para: Widgets within this region may pass x=0, y=0, w=0, h=0 to use the layout cursor. Widgets that use the cursor advance it down by (widget_height + style.spacing) after each call.

parameterdescription.para: Left edge of the layout region.
Default widget width (used when widget's w parameter is 0).

memberdef.argsstring: (SYN_IMGUI_Context *ctx)
memberdef.name: syn_imgui_layout_end

briefdescription.para: End the auto-layout region.

memberdef.argsstring: (SYN_IMGUI_Context *ctx)
memberdef.name: syn_imgui_same_line

briefdescription.para: Place the next widget on the same row as the previous one.

detaileddescription.para: Call immediately before the next widget. The next widget's x is set to (previous widget right edge + style.spacing).

memberdef.argsstring: (SYN_IMGUI_Context *ctx, int16_t pixels)
memberdef.name: syn_imgui_spacing

briefdescription.para: Insert vertical spacing (moves the layout cursor down).

parameterdescription.para: Number of pixels to advance downward.

memberdef.argsstring: (SYN_IMGUI_Context *ctx, const char *text, int16_t x, int16_t y)
memberdef.name: syn_imgui_label

briefdescription.para: Draw a static text label (no navigation ID, no interaction).

detaileddescription.para: Uses style.fg for color. When inside a layout region with x=0, y=0, the label is drawn at the current cursor and the cursor advances.

memberdef.argsstring: (SYN_IMGUI_Context *ctx, int16_t x, int16_t y, int16_t w)
memberdef.name: syn_imgui_separator

briefdescription.para: Draw a horizontal separator line.

detaileddescription.para: When inside a layout region, the line spans the full layout width and the cursor advances by 1 + style.spacing.

parameterdescription.para: Width in pixels (0 = use layout width).

memberdef.argsstring: (SYN_IMGUI_Context *ctx, const char *label, int32_t *value, int32_t min, int32_t max, int32_t step, int16_t x, int16_t y, int16_t w, int16_t h)
memberdef.name: syn_imgui_spinner

briefdescription.para: Integer numeric spinner widget.

detaileddescription.para: Renders Label [< value >]. When focused, encoder delta increments the value by step. Returns true on the frame the value changes.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the current value (modified in place).
Increment / decrement amount per encoder tick.

simplesect.para: true if the value changed this frame.

memberdef.argsstring: (SYN_IMGUI_Context *ctx, int16_t x, int16_t y, int16_t w, int16_t h, int16_t *scroll)
memberdef.name: syn_imgui_scroll_begin

briefdescription.para: Begin a scrollable region.

detaileddescription.para: Widgets between scroll_begin and scroll_end are clipped to the viewport and offset by the scroll position. The scroll offset is auto-adjusted to keep the focused widget visible.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to user-owned scroll offset (persists between frames).

memberdef.argsstring: (SYN_IMGUI_Context *ctx)
memberdef.name: syn_imgui_scroll_end

briefdescription.para: End the scrollable region and draw scroll indicator.

memberdef.argsstring: (SYN_IMGUI_Context *ctx, const char *label, bool *state, int16_t x, int16_t y, int16_t w, int16_t h)
memberdef.name: syn_imgui_toggle

briefdescription.para: ON/OFF toggle switch.

simplesect.para: true if state was toggled this frame.

memberdef.argsstring: (SYN_IMGUI_Context *ctx)
memberdef.name: syn_imgui_begin_disabled

briefdescription.para: Begin a disabled region. Widgets draw dimmed and skip input.

detaileddescription.para: Calls may be nested; the region is re-enabled only when every begin_disabled has a matching end_disabled.

memberdef.argsstring: (SYN_IMGUI_Context *ctx)
memberdef.name: syn_imgui_end_disabled

briefdescription.para: End a disabled region.

memberdef.argsstring: (SYN_IMGUI_Context *ctx, const char *text, uint16_t color, int16_t x, int16_t y)
memberdef.name: syn_imgui_label_colored

briefdescription.para: Draw a label in an arbitrary color.

memberdef.argsstring: (SYN_IMGUI_Context *ctx, const char *text, int16_t x, int16_t y, int16_t w)
memberdef.name: syn_imgui_label_right

briefdescription.para: Draw a right-aligned label within a given width.

memberdef.argsstring: (SYN_IMGUI_Context *ctx, const char *text, int16_t x, int16_t y, int16_t w)
memberdef.name: syn_imgui_label_centered

briefdescription.para: Draw a centered label within a given width.

memberdef.argsstring: (SYN_IMGUI_Context *ctx, const char *title, int16_t x, int16_t y, int16_t w, int16_t h)
memberdef.name: syn_imgui_group_begin

briefdescription.para: Begin a visual group box with an optional title.

memberdef.argsstring: (SYN_IMGUI_Context *ctx)
memberdef.name: syn_imgui_group_end

briefdescription.para: End the group box.

memberdef.argsstring: (SYN_IMGUI_Context *ctx, const char **labels, size_t count, int32_t *active, int16_t x, int16_t y, int16_t w)
memberdef.name: syn_imgui_tabs

briefdescription.para: Horizontal tab selector.

detaileddescription.para: Renders a row of labeled tabs. Consumes one navigation ID. When focused, encoder cycles through tabs.

simplesect.para: true if the active tab changed.

memberdef.argsstring: (SYN_IMGUI_Context *ctx, const char *title, const int32_t *data, size_t count, int32_t min_val, int32_t max_val, int16_t x, int16_t y, int16_t w, int16_t h)
memberdef.name: syn_imgui_bar_chart

briefdescription.para: Vertical bar chart.

memberdef.argsstring: (SYN_IMGUI_Context *ctx, const uint8_t *icon, int16_t icon_w, int16_t icon_h, int16_t x, int16_t y, int16_t w, int16_t h)
memberdef.name: syn_imgui_icon_button

briefdescription.para: Button that displays a monochrome icon bitmap.

memberdef.argsstring: (SYN_IMGUI_Context *ctx, const char *text, int16_t x, int16_t y, int16_t w)
memberdef.name: syn_imgui_status_bar

briefdescription.para: Draw a single-line status bar with a separator above it.

memberdef.argsstring: (SYN_IMGUI_Context *ctx, const char *text, int16_t x, int16_t y, int16_t w)
memberdef.name: syn_imgui_separator_text

briefdescription.para: Draw a labeled separator: ── Title ──────────

memberdef.argsstring: (SYN_IMGUI_Context *ctx, const char *label, uint32_t *flags, uint32_t mask, int16_t x, int16_t y, int16_t w, int16_t h)
memberdef.name: syn_imgui_checkbox_flags

briefdescription.para: Checkbox that toggles a bitmask in a flags word.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the flags word (modified in place).

simplesect.para: true if the value changed this frame.

memberdef.argsstring: (SYN_IMGUI_Context *ctx, const char *label, int32_t value, int16_t x, int16_t y)
memberdef.name: syn_imgui_value_int

briefdescription.para: Draw a non-interactive "label: value" pair.

memberdef.argsstring: (SYN_IMGUI_Context *ctx, int32_t value, int32_t min, int32_t max, const char *overlay, int16_t x, int16_t y, int16_t w, int16_t h)
memberdef.name: syn_imgui_progress_bar_ex

briefdescription.para: Enhanced progress bar with overlay text and indeterminate mode.

parameterdescription.para: Current value. If value < min, renders indeterminate animation.

memberdef.argsstring: (SYN_IMGUI_Context *ctx, const char *label, bool *selected, int16_t x, int16_t y, int16_t w, int16_t h)
memberdef.name: syn_imgui_selectable

briefdescription.para: Full-width clickable row (like a borderless toggleable button).

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to selection state (toggled on click).

memberdef.argsstring: (SYN_IMGUI_Context *ctx, const char *label, bool *expanded, int16_t x, int16_t y, int16_t w, int16_t h)
memberdef.name: syn_imgui_collapsing_header

briefdescription.para: Collapsible section header.

detaileddescription.para: Renders "+ Label" (collapsed) or "- Label" (expanded). Toggles *expanded on click.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to expansion state (toggled on click).

simplesect.para: true if the expanded state changed this frame.

memberdef.argsstring: (SYN_IMGUI_Context *ctx, const char *text, int16_t x, int16_t y, int16_t w)
memberdef.name: syn_imgui_text_wrapped

briefdescription.para: Render word-wrapped text within a width.

memberdef.argsstring: (SYN_IMGUI_Context *ctx, int items, const int16_t *widths, int16_t height)
memberdef.name: syn_imgui_layout_row

briefdescription.para: Define a multi-column layout row.

detaileddescription.para: Subsequent auto-layout widgets fill columns left-to-right. Positive width = fixed pixels. Negative width = fill remainder.

parameterdescription.para: Context (must be inside a layout region).
Array of column widths (NULL for equal split).

memberdef.argsstring: (const SYN_IMGUI_Context *ctx, int16_t y, int16_t h)
memberdef.name: syn_imgui_widget_visible

briefdescription.para: Check if a widget at (y, h) is visible in the scroll viewport.

detaileddescription.para: Returns true if not in a scroll region or if any part is visible. Widgets that return false should still call next_id++ for focus.

simplesect.para: true if any part of the widget is visible (or no scroll active).

memberdef.argsstring: (SYN_IMGUI_Context *ctx, const char *text, int16_t x, int16_t y, int16_t clip_x, int16_t clip_y, int16_t clip_w, int16_t clip_h)
memberdef.name: syn_imgui_text_clipped

briefdescription.para: Draw text clipped to a bounding rectangle.

detaileddescription.para: Uses the canvas clip rect to prevent text overflow.

memberdef.argsstring: (SYN_IMGUI_Context *ctx, const char *text, int16_t *offset, int16_t x, int16_t y, int16_t w, int16_t speed)
memberdef.name: syn_imgui_text_marquee

briefdescription.para: Scrolling text label with pause at each end.

detaileddescription.para: If the text fits within w, it's drawn statically. Otherwise it scrolls left, pauses, scrolls right, pauses, and repeats. The caller owns the scroll state (just declare static int16_t off = 0;).

briefdescription.para: Immediate Mode GUI (IMGUI) implementation.
